name: Dimet (Siam) Public Company Limited
summary: Dimet (Siam) Public Company Limited manufactures and sells coating products in Thailand. It operates through four segments: Manufacturing and Sale of Coating Products, Construction Work, Sale of Construction Supplies, and Maintenance Services of Solar Farm and Others. The company also provides painting, construction, and hot dip galvanized services. In addition, it is involved in the provision of testing and calibration services for electrical and electronic equipment; distribution of thinners and steel towers; and generation, distribution, and transmission of electric power. The company was founded in 1982 and is based in Samut Prakan, Thailand.
